name: operator-seqtk
description: Atomic operator wrappers for common seqtk subcommands: sample, fqchk, size, comp, subseq, seq.

interface.longDescription: Wraps six seqtk operators on local or SSH environments with typed inputs and cached structured outputs: seqtk_sample_reads subsamples reads; seqtk_fqchk reports per-position quality and base composition; seqtk_size counts reads and bases; seqtk_comp writes per-read base composition; seqtk_subseq extracts reads by ID list; seqtk_seq converts formats, reverse-complements, and masks low-quality bases. The selected environment must provide seqtk on PATH.
defaultPrompt: Expose seqtk and subsample my FASTQ file.
Compute reads count and per-base quality of my FASTQ files using seqtk.
Extract reads by id list from my FASTQ using seqtk.
